content: We can hypothesize that a Transformer with attention-based emergent episodic memory can be augmented with a 2025-configurable ICM curiosity mechanism to dynamically prioritize storing and retrieving high-novelty episodic traces, mirroring how humans prioritize remembering unusual personal experiences over mundane repetitive ones. This combined architecture would give autonomous agents an intrinsic drive to explore new environments while naturally retaining the contextually salient episodic memories that improve future in-context decision-making.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
